name: Refried Beans
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Cooked kidney or black beans
recipeInstructions:
Any kind of beans may be refried. Extra servings may
be frozen and reheated.
Stir cook onion and garlic in oil over medium heat in
a nonstick pan until onion is translucent.
Add beans gradually and mash with the back of a wooden
spoon. Cook and stir until thickened. Add hot pepper
sauce. Serve on a plate.
1/6 recipe = 130 calories, 1 starchy choice, 1 protein
choice, 1.8 grams total fat, 0 saturated fat, 0
cholesterol, 7 grams protein, 21 grams carbohydrate,
133 mg sodium, 339 mg potassium. High in fibre.
MEXICAN BEANS variation: Stir 1/2 cup shredded Cheddar
or Monterey Jack cheese and 1 teaspoon chili powder into
the hot bean mixture until cheese melts.
1/6 recipe = 169 calories, 1 starchy choice, 1 protein
choice, 0.5 fats & oils, 2 grams saturated fat,
9 mg cholesterol, 10 grams protein, 21 grams carbohydrate,
194 mg sodium, 319 mg potassium. High in fibre.
